content:
MODULE: cosmos.mcp_server.resources
FILE: cosmos/mcp_server/resources.py (226 lines)
CATEGORY: mcp_server

DESCRIPTION: cosmos Resources - MCP Resource Implementations

Provides streaming resources:
- Memory context
- Knowledge graph
- Agent status
- Evolution metrics

CLASSES:
- cosmosResources: Resource implementations for the MCP server.

Provides read-only access to cosmo
  Methods: async def get_recent_context(self, max_length: int=4000) -> str
  Methods: async def get_memory_summary(self) -> str
  Methods: async def get_knowledge_graph_json(self) -> str
  Methods: async def get_active_agents_json(self) -> str
  Methods: async def get_fitness_metrics_json(self) -> str
  Methods: async def get_system_status_json(self) -> str
  Methods: async def get_conversation_history(self, max_turns: int=20) -> str
  Methods: async def get_working_memory_summary(self) -> str

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def handle_resource_read(resources: cosmosResources, uri: str) -> str
